scenes.dramatic_question: Will the patrol accept a reconnaissance mission whose true nature is being kept from them?
pressure_moves: commander强调上级只关心情报，不关心巡逻队的死活
军士提醒雪况恶劣，补给只能靠巡逻队自己背

affordances.cue: 追问指挥官这次侦察的真实目的——上级只关心情报、不关心巡逻队死活，话里有话。
检查巡逻队的装备与补给——军士提醒雪况恶劣，补给只能自己背。
打量同行的战友，看谁可靠、谁可能在压力下崩溃。

allowed_improvisation: invent other ranks present at briefing
never_invent details beyond 'strange sounds and explosions'

scenes.dramatic_question: Can the patrol cross the killing ground without being shot, frozen, or worse?
pressure_moves: any gunshot in the open is Terror-Inducing
every 5 min in the open costs a Fatigue point
风雪让能见度降到几米
allowed_improvisation: invent minor obstacles (snow bridges, ice crust)
never_invent enemy contact on the saddle

scenes.dramatic_question: What happened to the Austrians who held this position?
pressure_moves: a crazed survivor lunges with a bayonet from a hiding spot (DEX 12, 10 HP, bayonet 1D8)
Scavenge test uncovers supplies at Uncommon scarcity

affordances.cue: 用望远镜从掩体后观察阵地部署与仓促撤离的痕迹。
贴近阵地残骸，听冰下是否还有刚才那种怪声与爆炸节奏。

allowed_improvisation: invent discarded personal effects
never_invent written Austrian orders in a readable language

scenes.dramatic_question: How deep does this honeycomb go, and what drove the Austrians out?
pressure_moves: successive Stealth tests; loudest sound is meltwater drip
interior 0C, cold temporarily held at bay
allowed_improvisation: invent tunnel junctions and dead ends
never_invent a second way out that bypasses the blast chamber

scenes.dramatic_question: What did the Austrians' blasting unearth beneath the ice?
pressure_moves: SAN 0/1 [violence] at the carnage; 0/1 [unnatural] on realizing the wounds
Alertness test detects a faint ominous whistling from deeper in
ecrasite demolition cases still stacked by the far tunnels

affordances.cue: 检查爆炸现场的奥军遗体与伤口，判断这是常规炸药还是别的什么力量所为。
把坑道分支与那口无回音的玄武岩竖井走向记下来，标出拖痕通向哪里。

allowed_improvisation: invent specifics of the Austrian dead
never_invent the shaft's full depth or what lies at the bottom

san_triggers.source: the blast chamber carnage — Austrians torn apart
realizing the wounds were made by superhuman strength

scenes.dramatic_question: Do the investigators obey orders and withdraw, or push deeper toward the sound?
pressure_moves: the whistling grows louder and nearer, seemingly from everywhere
stumbling across a survivor curled in a side cul-de-sac, hands over ears
allowed_improvisation: invent the survivor's exact words (must be original dialogue)
never_invent that the source is visible yet

scenes.dramatic_question: Can the patrol outrun an unnatural gale across the open saddle?
pressure_moves: crossing now takes 10 min, Athletics every 5 min at -40%, 1D8 Fatigue per 5 min
the pursuer picks off stragglers one by one
1D6/1D12 SAN for those who see it resolve into a monstrous form
allowed_improvisation: invent near-misses and falls into snow
never_invent that the pursuer is harmed by the gale itself

san_triggers.source: the pursuer resolves into a monstrous form

scenes.dramatic_question: Can the exhausted patrol scale the rock chimney to safety before the snow overhang gives way?
pressure_moves: three Athletics/Survival(Alpine) tests over 60m; failure strands for 5 min; fumble = fall (60% Lethality)
STR x5 to unstick a stranded climber
each 30 min of sunset: avalanche on roll 00 (or 96-00 if a shot/explosion occurs)
allowed_improvisation: invent handholds and loose rock
never_invent an alternate route up that avoids the chimney

scenes.dramatic_question: Can the patrol hold the shelter through the night against something that wants to examine them?
pressure_moves: Survival(Alpine) to make shelter storm-tight (else partially-prepared cold rules)
invisible echolocation vibrations through walls: 0/1D6 SAN [unnatural]
1D3 attempts per night to wrench the door/windows open: summed STR opposed vs entity STR 100
snatched victim is probed (1/1D8 SAN [unnatural]) then dropped onto the glacier
allowed_improvisation: invent the survivor's folkloric explanation (original dialogue)
never_invent a known weakness for the entity

clock_ticks.reason: the entity tests the shelter door each night

san_triggers.source: invisible echolocation vibrations through the shelter walls

scenes.dramatic_question: At dawn, with the entity weakened by daylight, can the patrol seize a way out?
pressure_moves: option leap-into-snow: Athletics (min 6 dmg) else 6% Lethality, CON x5 vs stun
option avalanche: each shot 1%/grenade 5% to trigger, 10D6 dmg, STR x5 to avoid being swept; entity at <=20 HP retreats
option signal fire support: INT x5 to call + INT x5 to adjust, Heavy Weapons 40%+20% size; but Italian crews must make their own SAN roll
option rearm from Austrian positions: Stealth vs entity Alertness; assemble 80% Lethality charge, Demolitions to detonate
entity at daylight: -20% all skills, stays in shadow, wind needs 1 round to reactivate
allowed_improvisation: invent the specific moment of the breakout
never_invent a fifth escape option

scenes.dramatic_question: Did the patrol's choices save them — or doom ten thousand men to the White Friday avalanches?
pressure_moves: forced entity retreat: +1D6 SAN; mission complete: +1D3 SAN
if entity survived and was left on the glacier: White Friday buries it, 0/1D6 SAN [helplessness] for guilt
if the patrol triggered the avalanche themselves: blamed for the disaster, reduce 1D2 Bonds by 3
if the entity was killed: no personal blame, though the disaster still comes
telling the truth to high command: nobody believes them, they're separated and transferred; suppressing truth: +1D3 SAN
allowed_improvisation: invent epilogue details for survivors
never_invent that the disaster was averted

san_triggers.source: the White Friday disaster — guilt over the avalanches
